ground_truth.title: Hotel brands: Ultimate guide to the top hotel chains - SiteMinder
ground_truth.author: Dean Elphick
ground_truth.main_content: Discover top hotel brands of every global hotel chain: Marriott, Hilton, IHG, Hyatt, Wyndham, Accor, Choice Hotels, and Best Western. The world's eight largest hotel groups manage a significant portion of the global hotel industry's hotel rooms. Marriott International stands as the world's largest hotel chain, followed by Hilton and IHG. Each major hotel brand offers distinct experiences from luxury to economy accommodations. The article provides detailed information about each major hotel chain including their brand portfolios, loyalty programs, and market presence.
